ci_support_linux_64_r_base4.4.yaml:
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
cran_mirror:
- https://cran.r-project.org
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
pin_run_as_build:
  r-base:
    min_pin: x.x
    max_pin: x.x
r_base:
- '4.4'
target_platform:
- linux-64

about.summary: Contains functions from: Aho, K. (2014) Foundational and Applied Statistics for Biologists using R.  CRC/Taylor and Francis, Boca Raton, FL, ISBN: 978-1-4398-7338-0.
Contains functions from: Aho, K. (2014) Foundational and Applied Statistics for Biologists using R.  CRC/Taylor and Francis, Boca Raton, FL, ISBN: 978-1-4398-7338-0.

name: r-asbio
raw_meta_yaml:
{% set version = "1.13" %}
{% set posix = 'm2-' if win else '' %}

package:
  name: r-asbio
  version: "{{ version|replace("-", "_") }}"

source:
  url:
    - {{ cran_mirror }}/src/contrib/asbio_{{ version }}.tar.gz
    - {{ cran_mirror }}/src/contrib/Archive/asbio/asbio_{{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: fa6e241328d7b112956865c43629c4632ad3c60d8a33de91b13f1c6f77582913

build:
  number: 0
  noarch: generic
  rpaths:
    - lib/R/lib/
    - lib/
  missing_dso_whitelist:
    - '*/R.dll'        # [win]
    - '*/Rblas.dll'    # [win]
    - '*/Rlapack.dll'  # [win]

requirements:
  build:
    - {{ posix }}zip               # [win]
    - cross-r-base {{ r_base }}    # [build_platform != target_platform]
  host:
    - r-base
    - r-desolve
    - r-gwidgets2
    - r-gwidgets2tcltk
    - r-lattice
    - r-multcompview
    - r-mvtnorm
    - r-pixmap
    - r-plotrix
    - r-scatterplot3d
    - r-tkrplot
  run:
    - r-base
    - r-desolve
    - r-gwidgets2
    - r-gwidgets2tcltk
    - r-lattice
    - r-multcompview
    - r-mvtnorm
    - r-pixmap
    - r-plotrix
    - r-scatterplot3d
    - r-tkrplot

test:
  commands:
    - $R -e "library('asbio')"           # [not win]
    - "\"%R%\" -e \"library('asbio')\""  # [win]

about:
  home: https://kenaho.aws.cose.isu.edu/shiny/apps/asbio_shiny.Rmd
  license: GPL-2.0-or-later
  summary: 'Contains functions from: Aho, K. (2014) Foundational and Applied Statistics for Biologists using R.  CRC/Taylor and Francis, Boca Raton, FL, ISBN: 978-1-4398-7338-0.'
  license_family: GPL3
  license_file:
    - {{ environ["PREFIX"] }}/lib/R/share/licenses/GPL-2

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - conda-forge/r
    - PertuyF

# Package: asbio
# Type: Package
# Title: A Collection of Statistical Tools for Biologists
# Version: 1.5-5
# Depends: R (>= 2.15.1), tcltk
# Imports: scatterplot3d, pixmap, plotrix, mvtnorm, deSolve, lattice, multcompView, grDevices, graphics, stats, utils
# Suggests: akima, boot
# Date: 2019-1-23
# SystemRequirements: BWidget
# Author: Ken Aho
# Maintainer: Ken Aho <kenaho1@gmail.com>
# Description: Contains functions from: Aho, K. (2014) Foundational and Applied Statistics for Biologists using R.  CRC/Taylor and Francis, Boca Raton, FL, ISBN: 978-1-4398-7338-0.
# License: GPL (>= 2)
# LazyLoad: yes
# NeedsCompilation: no
# Packaged: 2019-01-23 21:14:02 UTC; Ken Aho
# Repository: CRAN
# Date/Publication: 2019-01-23 22:10:03 UTC
